3_5_0.introDesc: Let's take a look at some of the new features.

scanner.title: New Scanner
scanner.content: The scanner's internal logic has been completely revamped. It now uses a more contextually aware and accurate algorithm.

scanner2.title: New Scanner
scanner2.content: The scanner now supports Anime Offline Database for data matching.

scanner3.title: Scanner Configuration
scanner3.content: You can now fine-tune the scanner's matching behavior. See the documentation for more information.

issueRecorder.title: Issue Recorder
issueRecorder.contentText: The issue recorder has been improved and can now record the UI, making bug reports more detailed.

transcodeNewPlayer.title: Transcoding Player
transcodeNewPlayer.content: Transcoding/Direct Play now uses Seanime's custom player, also used by Seanime Denshi and online streaming.

search.title: Search
search.content: The Search menu item now opens the search page. You can also quickly search from any page by pressing 'S'.

entry.title: New Player Features
entry.contentText: Press 'H' to quickly look up characters while watching. Press 'Z' to toggle Stats for Nerds.

3_7_0.introDesc: Let's take a look at some of the new features.

security.title: Security Improvements
security.content: 3.7.0 includes several security improvements, including secure modes. See the documentation for more information.

tags.title: Tags
tags.content: The search page now allows searching by tags.

adultContent.title: Adult Content in Global Search
adultContent.content: Global search no longer filters adult content if you have it enabled. (Remember: press 'S' to open global search)

bugFixes.title: Bug Fixes
bugFixes.content: Several bugs have been fixed in this version, including some related to Seanime Denshi and plugins. Read the full changelog for more details.

3_8_0.introDesc: Let's take a look at the biggest additions in this version.

torrentSearch.title: Torrent Search & Downloads
torrentSearch.content: Torrent search can now be expanded across multiple providers at once. This version also fixes some edge cases in Debrid downloads.

subtitleTranslation.title: Subtitle Translation
subtitleTranslation.content: The Subtitle Translator now supports OpenAI-compatible local LLMs, so tools like LM Studio and Ollama can be used as local translation backends.

externalPlayerLink.title: Local Subtitle Files
externalPlayerLink.content: Local subtitle files are now automatically detected from the video folder, and external player links can use the new '{subtitleUrl}' placeholder for those files.

spoilers.title: Hide Spoilers
spoilers.content: You can now hide spoilers throughout the app. On anime pages, the new '/spoilers' command lets you toggle spoilers for that specific anime.

onlineStreaming.title: Online Streaming
onlineStreaming.content: Online streaming now uses a new HTTP/1-based proxy and can automatically switch between providers until it finds one that works.

defaultEpisodeSource.title: Default Episode Source
defaultEpisodeSource.content: Choose which episode source Seanime should open by default when you access an anime page.

uiSettingsRedesign.title: Redesigned UI Settings
uiSettingsRedesign.content: The User Interface settings panel has been redesigned for easier navigation.

precarga.title: Route Preloading
precarga.content: Seanime can now preload routes in the background for instant navigation. You can adjust the preloading behavior in the new UI settings panel.

entryHeader.title: UI Updates
entryHeader.content: The media header has been slightly redesigned. There are also new animations and transitions for a smoother experience.

extensions.title: Extensions
extensions.content: Extensions can now be disabled without uninstalling them, and plugins have new APIs for settings, authentication, and extension management.

extensionSecureMode.title: Extension Secure Mode
extensionSecureMode.content: Enable Extension Secure Mode to receive a confirmation prompt whenever an extension attempts to perform a sensitive action.

denshi.title: Denshi Window State
denshi.content: Seanime Denshi now remembers window position and size, so reopening the app brings you back to the same desktop layout.

bugFixes.title: Bug Fixes
bugFixes.content: Several bugs have been fixed in this version, including some related to the integrated player. Read the full changelog for more details.

3_9_0.introDesc: Let's take a look at the biggest additions in this release.

libmpvPlayer.title: New Built-in Player (Denshi)
libmpvPlayer.content: Denshi now features a libmpv-based built-in player. It offers hardware-accelerated rendering directly in the app viewport, flawless codec & subtitle support, and supports mpv.conf options and shaders.

torrentStreaming.title: Faster Torrent Streaming
torrentStreaming.content: Torrent streaming startup is now up to 20% faster depending on seeding, with more accurate download progress reporting and fixed batch selection.

debridStreaming.title: Faster Debrid Streaming
debridStreaming.content: Debrid streaming launch is now up to 5 seconds faster for cached streams.

bugFixes.title: Bug Fixes
bugFixes.content: Several bugs have been fixed in this release, including progress tracking for MPV/IINA, manga image proxy issues, and Seanime Denshi's Electron has been updated to 42.4.0. Read the full changelog for more details.

3_10_0.introDesc: Let's take a look at the biggest additions in this release.

mangaSourceRefresh.title: Manga Source Refresh
mangaSourceRefresh.content: Manga source refreshing has been improved. In addition to updating saved sources, you can now assign sources to manga who have none, or re-evaluate all of them.

torrentAvailability.title: Torrent Availability
torrentAvailability.content: Enable this to show availability badges on recent episodes missing from your library and in Continue Watching when using torrent or Debrid streaming.

onlineStreaming.title: Online Streaming
onlineStreaming.content: Online streaming can now proxy subtitles, refresh stale source URLs, and keep your provider, server, quality, audio, and subtitle choices more reliably.

pluginTrayBadges.title: Plugin Tray Badges
pluginTrayBadges.content: Badge counts from tray plugins are now shown on the main tray icon even when the plugin is not pinned.

mpvcoreLogs.title: Export MpvCore Logs
mpvcoreLogs.content: When MpvCore logging is enabled you can now export its logs from the Video Playback settings for faster bug reports.

bugFixes.title: Bug Fixes
bugFixes.content: This release also fixes lagging or missing subtitles in VideoCore, MPV/IINA watch progress, media container detection, and more. Read the full changelog for details.
